heading: Enterprise Survey and People Analytics Platform
desc: Built a production React/TypeScript platform for survey creation, response tracking, ActiveONA network analysis, participant management, report generation, and AI-assisted insights. Implemented complex dashboards, dark mode theming, localized survey workflows, graph visualizations, resizable panels, interactive filters, and chatbot-driven data exploration.

heading: ActiveONA Network Analytics Dashboard
desc: Developed an interactive organizational network analysis dashboard with 2D/3D graph visualization, participant filtering, searchable name and manager filters, resizable data drawers, detail popouts, privacy-aware name masking, and an embedded Cogni assistant that highlights and filters people directly from chatbot responses.

heading: Survey Creation and Management UI
desc: Built a self-service survey creation and management experience with multi-step modals, participant uploads, test survey delivery, QR/link previewing, localized default templates, response dashboards, themed participant tables, dark mode support, and accurate completion/participant metrics.

heading: AI Report and Cogni Assistant Interface
desc: Implemented frontend workflows for AI-assisted people analytics, including Cogni chatbot UI, Markdown response rendering, network interaction parsing, chart-specific insight generation, and polished dashboard/report experiences for organizational analysis.

heading: Portfolio v1
desc: Interactive web experience using Three.js, Blender 3D modeling, GSAP Scroll Triggers, and much more. Previous version of this portfolio.

heading: Mobile Detailing Service FrontEnd
desc: Frontend design and development for Mobile Detailing Service. Bootstrap, Figma, Adobe Photoshop/Express, and GSAP Scroll Triggers.
